Some games lecture you to pay strict and ater close attention to the rules. Alter one aspect, and the whole game is thrown out of kilt. “if you dare to amend even the most minor detail, you are anathemal A heretict You are rho lange playing our game, but at most afoul variant thereof, Moreever, our lawyers will hunt you dawn and kill you.” ‘Here's what we think Rules are made to be broken, The play’s the thing, The gamemaster’s job is to mainlain tension and help the players tel satisfying story — not to spend all his time looking things up on tables and making, calculations. Go ahead — junk any rule you don't like, add anything that strikes your fan ‘cy; mutate, fold and spindle at wll, Feel free to change your mind at whim.
